markdown:
#  View a Prime Contract's Owner Invoices (Beta) 
#####  In Beta
This content is for participants in the Project Financials: Modernized Experience for Prime Contracts beta program.
##  Background 
To navigate to the owner invoices associated with a prime contract, click the **Invoices** tab in the contract.
Things to Consider
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * **Admin** level permission on the Prime Contracts tool.


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create Owner Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/create-owner-invoices)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Prime Contracts** tool.
  2. In the contracts table, locate the prime contract.
  3. Click the contract's **Number** link to open it.
  4. In the contract, click the **Invoices** tab to view the **Invoices (Payment Applications)** table.  
![Prime Contract Invoices](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/7c418cba3c990ac60a2ccc330809139f/1f1e3d3b693a7e68cbe6ae9d4ab4ea35/prime-contract-invoices.png?fm=webp)
  5. Choose from these options:
     * To review the invoice line items, scroll to the up/down and left/right.
     * To open an invoice, click its **Number** link.


## See Also
  * [View Prime Contracts (Beta)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/beta-view-prime-contracts)
  * [Edit Prime Contracts (Beta)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/edit-prime-contracts)
  * [Create Prime Contracts (Beta)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/beta-create-prime-contracts)
title: View a Prime Contract's Owner Invoices (Beta)
description: How to view the owner invoices associated with a prime contract.
